column8: port td5_vfx_update_ambient_density mirrors orig: env pair walk +0x36 cnt+0x2c clamp 0x80 plus +1/-1 ramp toward target; offsets and semantics preserved
port td5_vfx_render_ambient_streaks collapses D3D3 sprite-template + QueueTranslucentPrimitiveBatch pipeline into D3D11 quad batch; same advect/recycle semantics same recycle bounds (8000/6000/3895)

port wheel_lookup_static_hed stores only atlas UVs + tex page; orig pre-bakes 4-quad-per-wheel templates into scratch buffers (DAT_004C43B8 / g_wheelHubcapSpriteScratch). D3D3 templates -> per-frame D3D11 stream emission

orig built per-actor UV lookup table g_wheelTireUvTable_u/v (cell stride DAT_0045D5DC) for hubcap sub-tile indexing; port replaces table with per-slot hub_page (800+slot*2+1) + inline UV calc in render_vehicle_wheel_billboards

port render_vehicle_wheel_billboards is D3D3->D3D11 ARCH-DIVERGENCE; invariants confirmed: hub spin abs(spd>>14) clamp 3, front_angle=slip_z*-4 rear=slip_x*-4, steering yaw from steering_command>>8, cardef+0x82/+0x84 radius/halfw
